title: Shared definitions for mrw analysis documents

schema_version.description: Semver of the document schema. Minor bump = additive, major bump = breaking.

track_id.description: First 16 hex chars of the SHA-256 of the original source file bytes.

seconds.description: Seconds from t=0 = first sample of the normalized audio decode. 3 decimal places.

confidence.description: 0..1, 3 decimal places. Semantics defined where used; comparable within one field, not across documents.

timeseries.description: Uniform-hop dense series. values[i] is the measurement at start_seconds + i*hop_seconds. Sample at arbitrary t by linear interpolation of the two neighboring indices, clamped at the ends.

hop_seconds.description: Spacing between consecutive values. Pipeline default 0.01 (100 Hz).

values.description: Plain numbers, rounded per the document precision contract. Swift: [Double].

interval.description: Half-open [start, end). Interval lists are sorted by start_seconds and non-overlapping within a list.

event_times.description: Sorted ascending list of event times in seconds. Query via binary search.
